name: bismark
description: Bismark — Plataforma SaaS multi-rifero para organizar rifas y sorteos

scripts.setup:local: npm run db:local --workspace=@bismark/api && npm run db:migrate --workspace=@bismark/api && npm run db:seed --workspace=@bismark/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@bismark/shared && npm run build --workspace=@bismark/api && npm run build --workspace=@bismark/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@bismark/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bismark/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bismark/web
